title: Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A classic Southeast Asian dish featuring marinated chicken skewers grilled to perfection. Serve with peanut sauce for an authentic experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together peanut butter, coconut milk, and 1 tsp of salt. Add the chicken and mix until well coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a shallow dish, mix together rice flour and a pinch of salt. Toss the skewers in the flour mixture to coat.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large grill pan over medium-high heat. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning frequently, until cooked through.
Serve the satay hot with peanut sauce and chopped peanuts.
Note: For an authentic experience, serve the satay with ketupat or nasi lemak.
